sentences.arabic: لَاحَظَ تَامِرٌ أَنَّ كُرْسِيَّهُ تَحَرَّكَ مِنْ مَكَانِهِ.
sentences.translation: Tamir je primijetio da se njegova stolica pomjerila sa svog mjesta.
sentences.translationEn: Tamir noticed that his chair had moved from its place.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ مُتَأَكِّدًا أَنَّهُ وَضَعَهُ هُنَاكَ أَمْسِ.
sentences.translation: Bio je siguran da ga je juče stavio tamo.
sentences.translationEn: He was sure he had placed it there yesterday.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَ أُمَّهُ إِذَا كَانَتْ تَنَظَّفَتِ الْغُرْفَةَ.
sentences.translation: Pitao je majku je li čistila sobu.
sentences.translationEn: He asked his mother if she had cleaned the room.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتِ الْأُمُّ: نَعَمْ، نَظَّفْتُ الْأَرْضِيَّةَ وَحَرَّكْتُ الْأَثَاثَ قَلِيلًا.
sentences.translation: Majka je rekla: Da, očistila sam pod i malo pomjerila namještaj.
sentences.translationEn: The mother said: Yes, I cleaned the floor and moved the furniture a little.

sentences.arabic: ابْتَسَمَ تَامِرٌ وَشَكَرَ أُمَّهُ عَلَى النَّظَافَةِ.
sentences.translation: Tamir se nasmiješio i zahvalio majci na čišćenju.
sentences.translationEn: Tamir smiled and thanked his mother for cleaning.
